summary_en: Execution period extended from May 31 to Sep 30, 2026. Authorization unchanged: 200,000 shares (0.98% S/O), ¥35.0M upper limit, open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange. Reason: insider-trading compliance pause and capital-flexibility rationale; acquisition resuming May 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Extension of Share Acquisition Period (Self-Tender Offer under Company Law Article 165(2))
translation_en_brief: On 25 May 2026, ZETA Inc. announced an extension of its share acquisition period. The company had previously authorized a buyback of up to 200,000 shares (0.98% of outstanding shares) with an upper limit of ¥35.0 million, via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, with an initial execution window from 3 March to 31 May 2026. Citing prudent capital-allocation management and the need to comply with insider-trading regulations (during which acquisition activity was suspended), the board has now extended the execution window to 30 September 2026. Acquisition resumed in May 2026 on a rolling basis. The authorization ceiling and share/yen limits remain unchanged.
